SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo

Class MeteoProperties

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo.MeteoProperties
public final class MeteoProperties extends Object
Centralised property names used by the meteo application messages.

The soutenance review (1.10) flagged that wind/alert messages were created using inline string literals scattered across WeatherStation, WeatherOffice, WindTurbine and the demo subscriptions. This class collects every property name in one place so a future rename only requires editing this file.

Every constant is also referenced by the dedicated message factories (WindMessageFactory, MeteoAlertMessageFactory) and by the dedicated filter helpers (MeteoFilters).

Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa

    Wind force (m/s), serialised as Double via Double.toString(double).

    static final String
    OFFICE_ID
    Identifier of the publishing WeatherOffice.

    The original payload, exposed as a property so value filters can match on it.

    Identifier of the publishing WeatherStation.
    static final String
    TYPE
    Discriminator of the message kind: see TYPE_WIND / TYPE_ALERT.
    static final String
    TYPE_ALERT
    Value of TYPE for alert messages.
    static final String
    TYPE_WIND
    Value of TYPE for wind messages.
    static final String
    X
    X component of the wind vector.
    static final String
    Y
